## Outcome

Describe the observable result and the approved feature or repository requirement it serves.

## Boundaries and decisions

- [ ] I read `FEATURES_FORWARD.md` and `FEATURES_DEFERRED_OR_REMOVED.md`.
- [ ] This change does not weaken product invariants or introduce deferred/removed scope.
- [ ] Lasting architectural decisions are documented.
- [ ] No task content is added to diagnostics and no runtime cloud dependency is introduced.

## Verification

List exact commands and manual scenarios run, including both timer modes, recovery, data
migration, Windows accessibility, or Reduced Motion where applicable.

## Skipped checks and remaining risk

State why a check was not applicable or could not run, and identify remaining risk. Use
“None” rather than leaving this section blank.
